text: Capstone (proposed program): reframe interactive theorem proving as model-based RL - learn a fast hierarchical world model of Lean and plan with it under an equal-Lean-call-budget protocol (an HWM->ITP port). Status: the data layer is real - a four-stage pipeline produces (state, edit, next-state, feedback) records including the novel FAILURE dynamics, validated at fixture scale (a-0001..a-0003). The world model, baseline, planner, and evaluation are unbuilt (a-0004..a-0008), 0 GPU-hours spent. The contribution is framed as conceptual + an open dataset/benchmark + a clean equal-budget comparison, with an honest expectation of modest gains at small scale.
